subcodes.first_line: O ye two heralds of the love of God! The third letter, which was dated the ninth of Jamádí'l-Avval 1326, hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو منادی محبت الله نامه ثالث که بتاریخ ۹ جمادی الاول ۱۳۲۶ مرقوم بود رسید
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @importance of community building, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity
